# 3.4 Event Publishing

Typed convenience layer over `PipelineEvent[T]` and `PubSubPublisher[F]` from `pipeline-models`. One method per event type per BEHAVIORAL_SPECS §4.

#### `IngestionEventPublisher[F[_]]` — Trait

```
trait IngestionEventPublisher[F[_]] {
  def billTextAvailable(event: BillTextAvailableEvent): F[String]
  def billTextIngested(event: BillTextIngestedEvent): F[String]
  def voteRecorded(event: VoteRecordedEvent): F[String]
  def memberUpdated(event: MemberUpdatedEvent): F[String]
}
```

Each method: wraps payload in `PipelineEvent.create(eventType, source, payload)`, delegates to `PubSubPublisher[F].publish`, returns message ID.
Event types: `"bill.text.available"`, `"bill.text.ingested"`, `"vote.recorded"`, `"member.updated"`.
Source injected via config.

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| `billTextAvailable` publishes `"bill.text.available"` | Capture → verify eventType |
| `billTextIngested` publishes `"bill.text.ingested"` | Capture → verify eventType |
| `voteRecorded` publishes `"vote.recorded"` | Capture → verify eventType |
| `memberUpdated` publishes `"member.updated"` | Capture → verify eventType |
| Source from config, not hardcoded | Two instances with different sources → verify different source in events |
| Event includes generated UUID and timestamp | Published event → eventId non-null UUID, timestamp ≈ now |
| Publisher failure propagates as `PublishFailed` | Mock throws → `PublishFailed` raised |
| Retry wraps publish calls | Mock 1 failure then success → succeeds on retry |

#### `EventTypeConstants` — Object

```
object EventTypeConstants {
  val BillTextAvailable = "bill.text.available"
  val BillTextIngested = "bill.text.ingested"
  val VoteRecorded = "vote.recorded"
  val AnalysisCompleted = "analysis.completed"
  val MemberUpdated = "member.updated"
  val UserProfileUpdated = "user.profile.updated"
  val ScoringUserRequested = "scoring.user.requested"
  val ScoringUserCompleted = "scoring.user.completed"
  val DailyIngestionStart = "daily.ingestion.start"
}
```

| Criterion | Test |
|-----------|------|
| All strings dot-separated lowercase | Each constant matches `^[a-z]+(\.[a-z]+)+$` |
| Constants match BEHAVIORAL_SPECS §4 catalog | Cross-reference each constant against spec |
